steps.title: Calculate spending on purchased movies
steps.content:
Maya buys 3 movies at \$7.50 each:
$$3 \times 7.50 = 22.50$$
So she spends \$22.50 on purchases.

steps.title: Find the remaining gift card balance
steps.content:
Starting balance minus purchase spending:
$$60.00 - 22.50 = 37.50$$
Maya has \$37.50 left to spend on rentals.

steps.title: Calculate how many rental movies she can afford
steps.content:
With \$37.50 remaining and rental movies costing \$1.50 each:
$$\frac{37.50}{1.50} = 25$$
Maya can rent 25 movies. The correct answer is choice B.
